node.statement: RIGHT REDUCTION. With a,b,p as in node 1.1, set q:=P(b‚ąėa)=b‚ąėa-h_{b,a} in A, h_{b,a}=b‚ąėa-P(b‚ąėa) in Ker P (def square-hole). Crude bounds ||q||=||P(b‚ąėa)||<=C||a||||b|| and ||h_{b,a}||=||b‚ąėa-P(b‚ąėa)||<=||b‚ąėa||+||P(b‚ąėa)||<=C||a||||b|| (GT-Pprops, GT-jb-submult ||b‚ąėa||<=||a||||b||). CLAIM: (a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘ(b‚ÄĘa) = P(a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa)) + E_R with ||E_R|| <= C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. PROOF: a‚ÄĘa=p, b‚ÄĘa=P(b‚ąėa)=q, so (a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘ(b‚ÄĘa)=P(p‚ąėq). Substitute p=a^2-h_{a,a}, q=b‚ąėa-h_{b,a} and expand by bilinearity (def jordan-product): p‚ąėq=a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa)-h_{a,a}‚ąė(b‚ąėa)-a^2‚ąėh_{b,a}+h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a}. Apply P (real-linear, GT-Pprops): P(p‚ąėq)=P(a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa))-P(h_{a,a}‚ąė(b‚ąėa))-P(a^2‚ąėh_{b,a})+P(h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a}). So E_R=-P(h_{a,a}‚ąė(b‚ąėa))-P(a^2‚ąėh_{b,a})+P(h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a}). Node 1.2.1 bounds ||P(h_{a,a}‚ąė(b‚ąėa))||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. For P(a^2‚ąėh_{b,a}) decompose a^2=p+h_{a,a}: P(a^2‚ąėh_{b,a})=P(p‚ąėh_{b,a})+P(h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a}); node 1.2.2 bounds ||P(p‚ąėh_{b,a})||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Node 1.2.3 bounds ||P(h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a})||<=C eta||a||^3||b||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b|| (eta<=1), and this term appears twice. Summing: ||E_R||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses node 1.2.1, node 1.2.2, node 1.2.3, GT-Pprops, GT-jb-submult, def near-fixed-algebra, def square-hole, def jordan-product.
